commit.author: drdave-flexnteos <flexnetos@de-flex.net>

lines.content: - [ ] Generator emits or validates Claude adapter assets without hand-maintained drift.
- [ ] Generator emits or validates Codex adapter assets without hand-maintained drift.
- [x] Cursor and Windsurf paths are represented as future adapter targets or explicitly out of scope.
- [ ] The CLI reference's `.hermes/` text for the Windsurf initializer is verified live and either supported or logged as docs drift.
- [x] The CLI reference's `.hermes/` text for the Windsurf initializer is verified live and either supported or logged as docs drift.
- [x] Generic MCP clients are represented as MCP config only, with workflow instructions supplied separately.
- [x] Generated adapters preserve `.kb/skills/` as the canonical GitKB workflow source.
- [x] Adapter generation depends on [[tasks/meta-gitkb-skill-inventory-adapter-parity]] for canonical skill inventory proof.

- 2026-07-02: `codex-plugins/README.md` and `claude-plugins/README.md` already describe assistant-specific publication surfaces with a long-term meta-owned integration control plane as source of truth.

- 2026-07-02: `codex-plugins/plugins/gitkb/README.md` says `git-kb init codex` remains the canonical repo-local GitKB Codex asset source, and that lifecycle hooks/MCP ownership stay with active Codex config or meta control-plane wrapper.
- 2026-07-02: Canonical skill inventory proof passed in [[tasks/meta-gitkb-skill-inventory-adapter-parity]].
- 2026-07-02 rerun: `git-kb init claude --dry-run` would create 14 missing `.claude/skills/*` symlinks and skip existing rules/settings/CLAUDE assets.

- 2026-07-02 rerun: `git-kb init codex --dry-run --install-home` would create `$CODEX_HOME/skills/meta-9f262555` and `$CODEX_HOME/instructions/meta-9f262555`, with 53 repo-local assets skipped as already present.
- 2026-07-02 rerun: `git-kb init cursor --dry-run` would create `.kb/rules/*`, `.cursor/skills/*`, and `.cursor/rules/*` adapter paths.

- 2026-07-02 rerun: `git-kb init windsurf --dry-run` would create `.kb/rules/*`, `.windsurf/skills/*`, and `.windsurf/rules/*`; it did not report `.hermes/*` writes, so the CLI help text mentioning Hermes is live docs/help drift.
- 2026-07-02: This task still requires real generator/validator implementation and dry-run/dirty-file overwrite behavior before it can close.
# Progress Log
# Progress Log
- Reran harness initializer dry-runs against the live binary; recorded `.hermes`/Windsurf drift while leaving generator implementation criteria open.
- Recorded existing control-plane policy evidence; kept implementation criteria open because no generator/validator source change was made.

changes.title: Generate GitKB harness adapters from meta-plugin

lines.content: - 2026-07-02: `.kb/config.toml` currently has no `[hooks]` section.
- 2026-07-02: `git-kb init git --help` exposes `git-kb init git hooks` for GitKB git hooks.
- 2026-07-02: `git-kb hook --help` fails with `unrecognized subcommand 'hook'`, so adapters must not call `git-kb hook`.
- 2026-07-02 rerun: `git-kb init git hooks --dry-run` first reported 14 child repo `reference-transaction` hooks would be created and 0 already installed.
- 2026-07-02 rerun: `git-kb init git hooks` installed the GitKB `reference-transaction` hook into all 14 child repos.
- 2026-07-02 rerun: a follow-up `git-kb init git hooks --dry-run` reported 0 would be modified, 14 already installed, 0 errors.
- 2026-07-02: `/home/flexnetos/.codex/config.toml` still contains trusted hook state entries for other FlexNetOS paths; this task did not mutate or clean them.
# Progress Log
# Progress Log
- Ran the live GitKB git hook initializer instead of only documenting it; all 14 child repo `reference-transaction` hooks are now installed. Assistant hook validation criteria remain open.
- Recorded hook policy and live command proof; left missing-command/stale-trust validation implementation criteria open.

changes.title: Model GitKB hook toggles as meta-plugin policy

lines.content: - 2026-07-02: `/home/flexnetos/.codex/config.toml` contains `[mcp_servers.gitkb]` and `[mcp_servers.gitkb-yazelix]`.
- 2026-07-02: `codex-plugins/plugins/gitkb/.mcp.json` has an empty `mcpServers` object, and `codex-plugins/plugins/gitkb/.codex-plugin/plugin.json` does not register MCP servers.
- 2026-07-02: Initialized `git-kb mcp` tools/list smoke test returned 49 tools.

- 2026-07-02 rerun: `codex mcp list` still shows exactly two GitKB servers: `gitkb` owned by `/home/flexnetos/FlexNetOS/usr/libexec/gitkb-mcp-meta` and `gitkb-yazelix` owned by `/home/flexnetos/FlexNetOS/usr/libexec/gitkb-mcp-yazelix`.
# Progress Log
# Progress Log
- Reran `codex mcp list`; current owner state still matches policy. Duplicate-registration scanner/owner-conflict reporting implementation remains open.
- Confirmed current single-owner state and plugin-empty MCP policy; left scanner/validation implementation criteria open.

commit.message: Record live GitKB init and meta component reruns
